query: overcast gray flat lighting dull cloudy day no shadows depth collapsed
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: flat lighting — overcast gray, foggy collapsed depth, dull cloudy atmosphere, monotone bleakness

response.objective_caption: A black-and-white photograph of a curved streetlamp extending upward from the lower left against a dramatic sky filled with dense, textured storm clouds. The clouds display bulbous, pouch-like formations across the upper and middle portions of the frame, while brighter patches of sky appear near the lower right. A thin black border frames the image.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black-and-white photograph of a curved streetlamp extending upward from the lower left against a dramatic sky filled with dense, textured storm clouds. The bulbous, pouch-like cloud formations create an oppressive, heavy atmosphere evoking dread and unease across the upper and middle portions of the frame, while brighter patches of sky appear near the lower right. A thin black border frames the image.
